arts.ttl: Arsenal incoming sporting director Andrea Berta eyes transfer of €85m Brazil international
arts.sum: Arsenal’s sporting director-elect Andrea Berta is reportedly keeping an eye on Newcastle United midfielder Bruno Guimaraes. The Gunners are gearing up for a big summer shake up with a major midfield upgrade at the top of their agenda. arts.ttl: Arsenal star Gabriel Jesus issues huge injury update as Mikel Arteta handed return boost
arts.sum: Gabriel Jesus has issued an update on his rehabilitation process since suffering a season-ending injury at the start of January. Footage is included of Jesus treating his knee on the sofa with the help of an Arsenal physio.

arts.ttl: A defensive bargain, the £115m Premier League flop - and Rodri: Arsenal's new sporting director Andrea Berta's BEST and WORST transfers at Atletico Madrid
arts.sum: Andrea Berta may sound like an unknown name for most Premier League fans, but undeniably, he has gained a reputation when it comes to sealing initially thought-impossible deals.

arts.ttl: Samu Aghehowa asking price 'revealed' with Barcelona, Arsenal, Chelsea 'going to war' for star forward
arts.sum: Porto will reportedly refuse to sell Samu Aghehowa, who has been linked with Barcelona, Arsenal and Chelsea, for under €80m (£67m) during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Paul Merson makes Arsenal Champions League claim ahead of Real Madrid prediction
arts.sum: "I think it depends on who wins out of Real Madrid and Atletico Madrid," he told Sky Sports News when asked how far Arsenal can go in the competition. "I think if Atletico Madrid win, Arsenal have a bit of a chance.
